items.html:
• 带★要求，为产品重要和关键特性
  • 引出线不能断开，绝缘层和线芯不能损伤
items.translation:
• Items marked with ★ are important and critical characteristics
  • Lead wires must not be broken; insulation and conductor must not be damaged
